3204840.name: Time Over
3204840.description:
Unlock the secret to unparalleled success through the power of teamwork!

Time Over challenges you to prove that no mission is too difficult when you join forces with others. Your main mission is to find the boxes on time before the other players. Step into the shoes of a daring hero, joined by seven other unique characters, as you race against time to collect 10 elusive magic boxes. But beware—the clock isn’t your only enemy.

A mysterious hunter named Blue stalks your every move, threatening to unravel your plans. Only by crafting the perfect strategy and working in harmony can you hope to overcome the odds and achieve victory. Ready to put your skills to the ultimate test?

**Game Features:**

- **Race Against Time:** Beat the clock in a high-stakes challenge.

- **Teamwork Required:** Collaborate with 7 other characters to succeed.

- **Strategic Box Collection:** Gather 10 magic boxes while evading Blue.
